location.routecalculator.CalculatorName.Docs: The name of the route calculator resource.  Requirements:  + Can use alphanumeric characters (A–Z, a–z, 0–9) , hyphens (-), periods (.), and underscores (_).+ Must be a unique route calculator resource name.+ No spaces allowed. For example, `ExampleRouteCalculator`.

location.routecalculator.DataSource.Docs: Specifies the data provider of traffic and road network data.  This field is case-sensitive. Enter the valid values as shown. For example, entering `HERE` returns an error.Valid values include:  + `Esri`+ `Here`For more information about data providers, see the [Amazon Location Service data providers page](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/location/latest/developerguide/what-is-data-provider.html).

location.routecalculator.Description.Docs: The optional description for the route calculator resource.

location.routecalculator.PricingPlan.Docs: No longer used. If included, the only allowed value is `RequestBasedUsage`.
